shape_summary: Named DOM container IDs and CSS custom properties that ui-render writes into.

required_element_ids.description: Container into which renderRankings injects 6 division tables and the wild-card race.
Container into which renderTrends injects 30 per-team trend rows with inline-SVG sparklines.
Container into which renderUpcoming injects the schedule list (or empty-state copy).
Inline element whose textContent updateTimestamp overwrites with the fetch timestamp.
Initially hidden (display:none). showError sets its textContent and toggles visibility.

loading_state.convention: ui-shell pre-populates each panel with a 'Loading…' placeholder element of class .panel-loading. ui-render is responsible for clearing the panel's innerHTML before injecting rendered content.

empty_state.convention: ui-render writes an element of class .panel-empty-state into the panel when its data is empty.

required_custom_properties.description: Per-team primary color, one entry per MLB team (30 total). ABBR is the team's standard 2- or 3-letter abbreviation in uppercase.

css_contract.responsive_breakpoint: Single-column layout below 768px; multi-column grid above.

invariants: All five required IDs exist in index.html.
ui-render never queries the DOM via class-only selectors that match outside its own injected content (must be scoped to one of the five panel IDs).
ui-shell does not include any <script> tags other than the single module entry that bootstraps ui-render.
No external CDN stylesheets or scripts are referenced.
